job_description:
• 8+ years of technical experience, with at least 2 years focused on complex Agentic AI Salesforce implementations and custom data modelling.
• Strong Business Acumen: Ability to sit with business stakeholders and translate a vague "business need" into a specific "technical data requirement" for an AI prompt.
• Prior experience building AI Solutions and adopts an Agentic mindset when doing this workExpertise in "Context Engineering": Proven ability to curate business processes and metadata into high-performing prompts that reduce hallucinations and improve CSM trust.
• Deep Mastery of the Salesforce Platform: You must know the platform well enough to understand where the "cleanest" data lives and how to expose it to an agentAI Tooling Proficiency: Proficiency in the latest AI Tooling and best practicesExcellent Communication Skills: You must be able to explain to the product teams why a specific data point is being used to ground an agent's reasoning.
• Context-Driven Prompt Design: Craft precise, business-grounded prompts that leverage the company's specific Salesforce data structures — including custom objects, fields, and metadata — to minimize hallucinations and maximize agent reliabilityPrompt Best Practices: Apply established prompt engineering techniques (chain-of-thought, few-shot, role prompting, retrieval-augmented generation) to optimize response outputs across varied use casesIterative Prompt Testing & Evaluation: Continuously test, evaluate, and refine prompts using structured evaluation frameworks to measure accuracy, relevance, and consistency of responses over timeAwareness of LLM Limitations: Understand and proactively account for model limitations such as token constraints, context window management, and prompt injection risks Life at Salesforce Our Locations Our Locations North America Europe, Middle East, and Africa Asia Pacific Latin America Our Teams Our Teams Sales Technology & Product Customer Success Corporate Roles AI Research University University Overview Interns New Grads Advanced Degrees Associate Program Manager Talent Programs Talent Programs Overview Future Pathways India Return to Work Military Fellows Technical-to-Experimental Pivot: Transition from traditional technical execution into a forward-thinking, experimental role at the cutting edge of AI — operating at the forefront of what's possibleRapid POC Cycling: Quickly design, test, and iterate on Proofs of Concept with a tinkerer's mindset — identifying creative ways to weave emerging technologies into real business needs and presenting findings to inform high-level strategic decision-making.
• AI Solution Development: Take ownership of building end-to-end AI solutions — from concept to productionAI Industry Awareness: Maintain a deep, current pulse on the broader AI landscape — spanning tools, frameworks, and trends well beyond any single platform or ecosystem Business Process Alignment & Product-Engineering Translation: Partner with product leads to deeply understand CSM jobs-to-be-done (JTBD), ensuring all AI features and agent solutions are designed for productivity gains, time savings, and knowledge up-skilling.
• Serve as the connective tissue between product owners and the scrum team — converting high-level AI feature concepts into grounded, actionable technical requirements and prompt specifications.
• You must know the "why" behind custom objects and fields to ensure AI agents are querying the most relevant data Our Story Newsroom Blog Careers Trust Salesforce.

• Information and rights:If you prefer not to have your application processed using the AI-assisted tools described above, you may submit your resume directly to TA_EMEA@micron.
• Information and rights:If you prefer not to have your application processed using the AI-assisted tools described above, you may submit your resume directly to TA_EMEA@micron.
• The Platform will assign a match score based on how closely your stated and inferred skills match the requirements for the open role based on the content of your application, the Platform’s analysis described above and Micron’s configuration of the skill and AI qualification matching software.
• The Platform will assign a match score based on how closely your stated and inferred skills match the requirements for the open role based on the content of your application, the Platform’s analysis described above and Micron’s configuration of the skill and AI qualification matching software.
• Impact on Employment Decisions: The Eightfold AI recruiting software generates matching scores and skill inferences.
• Impact on Employment Decisions: The Eightfold AI recruiting software generates matching scores and skill inferences.
• Type of AI Technology: Micron uses the Eightfold AI recruiting software, a machine-learning talent-intelligence platform that uses natural-language processing to parse resumes, infer candidate skills and calculate compatibility scores with open positions.

job_title: Vehicle Operator II, Autonomy Systems Validation (2nd Shift)
job_description: • Check Application Status US English Français (Canada) Français (Canada) Search Jobs Search Jobs Check Application Status en-US English Français (Canada) Français (Canada) Wittmann, Arizona.

• 3+ years of experience leading regulatory compliance projects or validation efforts, heavily incorporating certification requirements Experience reading and interpreting industry standards such as UL 2202, UL 1741, UL 9741, IEC 61851, MIL-STD-50G or similar Work closely with the software and hardware engineering teams to understand test requirements Regulatory compliance experience with power conversion equipment, preferably charging systems Participate in design reviews, requirement reviews, DFMEAs, PFMEAs, and Hazard Analyses Prior experience in test plan development, equipment selection, and test execution Participate in design reviews and advise on applicable compliance requirements Support systems engineering to interpret standard requirements Strong technical communication and documentation skills Lead regulatory compliance projects with agencies and test labs, including preparing and filing compliance documentation.

• You will use your experience and judgment to plan and accomplish goals, as well as generate innovative solutions by applying creative and effective approaches to complex problems and opportunities.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• Develops infrastructure solutions based on customer requirements and documents technical knowledge through notes and procedures.
• It requires collaboration with certification engineers to ensure product compliance with current standards.
• Key responsibilities include addressing product quality and manufacturing issues through root-cause analysis, leading customer discussions to define requirements, mentoring junior engineers, and improving work practices and processes.
